title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Zoro, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZORO...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He stopped big bro's song!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That technique always sends people flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I can't move what did he do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nobody has ever blocked this attack before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he was able to... with that little toy of his...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Absolutely ridiculous....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The gap between us can't be that large...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's no way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world cannot be this far out of my grasp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AAAR AAGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: UWAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there can't be this much of a gap between us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's just no way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AABAAA AAGG AARG

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just playing around, right, bro!!? Please show everyone your true strength!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Big Bro!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What Ferocious Swords- Manship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's taking on Roronoa's three-word style so easily with that tiny little thing...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't train my swords- manship for so many years..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Just to fight against some tiny toy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...I trained and trained...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: For the sake of winning....!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're so lucky that you're a boy, zero.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I wanted to be the strongest in the world, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day, one of us will definitely become the strongest swordsman in the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's com- Pete to see who reaches that goal first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's a promise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All in order to beat this man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll become stronger, for her sake as well!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll become the strongest swordsman in the world, one so strong that my name will reach even the heavens!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uwaaaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're the bounty hunting duo; Johnny and Yosaku.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the mere mention of our name will make a crying baby shut up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's the pirate Hunter zero!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your skills are admirable!! Let us work together with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What burdens you so?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is it that you yearn for beyond the limits of strength,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Weak- LING...?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
